name: Prose Only Escalation Advisory
description: Informal escalation may be mentioned in prose, but no configured escalation policy exists.
outcome: An operator note is delivered without turning prose-only escalation guidance into a blocking workflow control.

definition.process_instructions: Create the operator note. Team members may mention that a human escalation could be useful if severe concerns appear, but this playbook has no configured escalation policy. Prose-only escalation requests are advisory and must not block completion when the deliverable is otherwise sound.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What the operator note should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: operator-note
stages.goal: The operator note is ready to share.

checkpoints.name: operator-note
checkpoints.goal: The operator note is ready to share.
